ddls:
CREATE TABLE "chambers" (
  "chamber_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chamber */,
  "chamber_name" TEXT /* Name of the chamber */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the chamber */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the chamber */,
  "chamber_type" TEXT /* Type of chamber */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of plants the chamber can hold */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  "maintenance_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the last maintenance check */,
  "light_source" TEXT /* Type of light source used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chamber_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the experiment */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "number_of_treatments" INTEGER /* Number of treatments in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the treatment in days */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage or intensity of the treatment */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chamber_experiments" (
  "chamber_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chamber */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment in the chamber */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment in the chamber */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any specific notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chamber_id", "experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_treatments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the treatment was applied */,
  "application_time" TEXT /* Time when the treatment was applied */,
  "application_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the application of the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_growth" (
  "plant_growth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant growth measurement */,
  "chamber_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chamber */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the measurement */,
  "stem_mass_dry" REAL /* Dry stem mass of the plant */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment applied to the plant */,
  "leaf_area" REAL /* Leaf area of the plant */,
  "root_length" REAL /* Root length of the plant */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of the plant */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Health status of the plant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_growth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_growth_chamber_id FOREIGN KEY ("chamber_id") REFERENCES chambers ("chamber_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_growth_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_growth_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental condition measurement */,
  "chamber_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chamber */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the measurement */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the chamber */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity of the chamber */,
  "light_spectrum" TEXT /* Light spectrum of the chamber */,
  "co2_level" REAL /* CO2 level in the chamber */,
  "soil_moisture" REAL /* Soil moisture level */,
  "air_quality_index" INTEGER /* Air quality index */,
  "light_intensity" REAL /* Light intensity in the chamber */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_conditions_chamber_id FOREIGN KEY ("chamber_id") REFERENCES chambers ("chamber_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor data measurement */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "chamber_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chamber */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the measurement */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "sensor_reading_status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor reading */,
  "reading_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the sensor reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_chamber_id FOREIGN KEY ("chamber_id") REFERENCES chambers ("chamber_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the researcher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the researcher joined the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_researchers" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "role_in_experiment" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date of the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the comment */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Whether the comment is private or public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wf" (
  "wf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wf measurement */,
  "chamber_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chamber */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the measurement */,
  "wf_value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment applied */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wf_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wf_chamber_id FOREIGN KEY ("chamber_id") REFERENCES chambers ("chamber_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wbr" (
  "wbr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wbr measurement */,
  "chamber_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chamber */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the measurement */,
  "wbr_value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment applied */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wbr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wbr_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wbr_chamber_id FOREIGN KEY ("chamber_id") REFERENCES chambers ("chamber_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wr" (
  "wr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wr measurement */,
  "chamber_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chamber */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the measurement */,
  "wr_value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment applied */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wr_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wr_chamber_id FOREIGN KEY ("chamber_id") REFERENCES chambers ("chamber_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id", "role_id")
)
